summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Makerise Innovations INCEPT-1 landing page. All backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. Frontend displays correctly with dark industrial theme, proper navigation, and all required sections. Contact form integrates successfully with backend API.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Contact form submission with proper data validation
Form validation rejecting invalid data with 422 status
Landing page loads with dark industrial theme (slate-950 background)
Fixed navigation with glassmorphism effect visible
Hero section displays correct headline 'Add Another Dimension to Your 2D World'
Hero section shows 2 CTAs: 'Explore INCEPT-1' and 'Contact R&D'
Innovation section displays 3 feature cards in bento grid layout
Technical Excellence section shows 2 specs and 6 technical features
Applications section displays 4 industry cards with proper icons
Contact form has all required fields: name, email, inquiry type dropdown, message
Contact form successfully integrates with /api/contact endpoint
Form clears fields after successful submission
Footer displays correct contact info: +91-9340151871 and wemakeverything@gmail.com
Footer mentions IIT Indore team credit
Smooth scroll navigation works for all sections
Mobile navigation menu functional with toggle button
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (19/19 features working)
